title: Interworld Slingshot Resource Surveys

summary: Benjamin SchaferRarified Technologies, Inc. We propose a new approach to atmospheric sensing at 30-100 km altitudes using photophoretically levitating tracers. Unlike natural aerosols, these tracers are designed to provide strong and […]
